D

DAMAGED - Enum constant in enum class product.ConservationStatus
Damaged conservation status
decreaseStock() - Method in class product.Pack
Decreases the stock of the products included in the pack
decreaseStock(int) - Method in class product.StoreProduct
It decreases the stock a certain value
deleteCart(Pack) - Method in class user.RegisteredClient
Removes a pack from the cart
deleteCart(Pack) - Method in class user.UnregisteredClient
Removes a pack from the cart
deleteCart(StoreProduct) - Method in class user.RegisteredClient
Removes a product from the cart
deleteCart(StoreProduct) - Method in class user.UnregisteredClient
Removes a product from the cart
deleteSecondHandProduct(SecondHandProduct) - Method in class store.Store
Deletes a new second hand product to the store
deleteStoreProduct(StoreProduct) - Method in class store.Store
Deletes a new store product to the store
DICE - Enum constant in enum class product.GameStyle
Dice game style
discount - package discount
It includes all the methods and classes necessary to apply and create discounts.
Discount - Class in discount
It implements the general discount
Discount(DiscountType, DiscountCoverage, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Constructor for class discount.Discount
Instantiates a new Discount
Discount(String, DiscountType, DiscountCoverage, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Constructor for class discount.Discount
Instantiates a new Discount with a certain id
DISCOUNT - Enum constant in enum class notification.NotificationType
 
DiscountCoverage - Enum Class in discount
It defines the discount coverages
DiscountFactory - Interface in discount
It defines the base discount constructors (without specific coverage)
DiscountType - Enum Class in discount
It defines the discount types
